mapper.select: SELECT spg.id, spg.prom_id, spg.goods_title, spg.goods_pic_url, spg.goods_url, spg.goods_status, spg.goods_remark, spg.kol_product_id, scp.id AS kol_id, scp.account, scp.platform_type, scp.like_tags, scp.avatar_url, scp.play_avg_num, scp.followers_num, scp.like_avg_num, scp.interact_avg_num, scp.video_count, scp.like_count, ssp.payment_amount, spgc.prom_like_tags, spgc.prom_price, spgc.remark, spgc.full_address, spgc.id AS correId, spgc.goods_waybill, spgc.goods_carrier, spgc.celebrity_prom_status, spgc.media_uploads, spgc.media_img_json, spgc.celebrity_status, spgc.discount_code, spgc.discount_off, spgc.discount_start_date, spgc.discount_end_date, spgc.media_uploads_draft, spgc.media_img_json_draft, spgc.video_tags, spgc.celebrity_counselor_id, spgc.celebrity_counselor_name, spgc.celebrity_price, spgc.online_time, spgc.celebrity_pay_amount, spgc.goods_attribute, ssp.prom_status, scp.country_name, spgc.celebrity_paypal_fees, spgc.is_including_tax, spgc.tax_amount FROM store_promotion_goods spg LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM store_promotion_goods_celebrity WHERE is_del != 1) spgc ON spg.id = spgc.goods_id LEFT JOIN store_celebrity_private scp ON spgc.celebrity_private_id = scp.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM store_seller_promotion WHERE is_del != 1) ssp ON ssp.id = spgc.prom_id WHERE spg.prom_id = #{promId} ORDER BY spg.create_time
